changes.description: Broadcast Presence {status:'online'} in register(), plus Presence {status:'offline'} already in unregister()
New file: GET /api/presence/{channel_id} returns {online_users: [...]} via ConnectionPool::get_channel_members()

evidence: All new tests pass. On register() → broadcasts Presence online to all subscribed channels. On unregister() → broadcasts Presence offline. REST endpoint returns online users per channel.
